title: STB Icons Pack
description: Icons for Minecraft Transit Railway of the fictional railway company STB
body:
# Français 🇫🇷
Ce pack de texture est un pack d'icônes destiné au mod [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)

Il représente la compagnie de train fictive STB, à utiliser pour sublimer toutes vos constructions qui utilisent le mod MTR !

Ce pack est utilisé sur le serveur minecraft : MTR France Server - Discord : [https://discord.gg/PHYnk84S](https://discord.gg/PHYnk84S)

### Il est recommandé d'aussi utiliser le pack de trains [STB Trains Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stb-trains-pack)

# English 🇬🇧
This texture pack is an icon pack designed for the [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod

It represents the fictional railway company STB, designed to enhance all your builds that use the MTR mod!

This pack is used on the Minecraft server: MTR France Server - Discord : [https://discord.gg/PHYnk84S](https://discord.gg/PHYnk84S)

### We also recommend using the [STB Trains Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stb-trains-pack)
